arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur ahead of West Ham & Crystal Palace in race to sign Juventus star
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are in pole position to sign Italian star Nicolo Fagioli, according to reports. Fagioli has been with Juventus since 2015 and after emerging from the youth ranks, now has 65 senior appearances to his name across all competitions. Club can set up negotiations for Tottenham star – Market axis can become ‘really hot’
arts.sum: Before picking up an injury in November, Guglielmo Vicario was a vital player for Tottenham Hotspur. Vicario has risen in stature at Tottenham since his arrival from Empoli in 2023 and has also become a leader-like figure for the club.
